# HPD.ML.Serialization.Zip.ParameterWriterRegistry

- Package: `HPD-ML-Serialization-Zip` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Serialization.Zip`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Serialization.Zip`
- Kind: `class`

Maps ILearnedParameters types to their serialization writers. Domain packages may register their own writers; HPD.ML-owned parameter types are registered by the serializer.

```csharp
public sealed class ParameterWriterRegistry
```
